source_recovery.description: The five source artifacts flagged missing by Stage42-A (dev/Stage34/Stage35 Stage39-C reports plus the Stage40-A JSON/MD audit) have been committed to reports/, along with the previously-missing Stage39-C dev/Stage34/Stage35 .md companions. All eight required source files are now present and were read directly for this audit.

numeric_consistency.verification_basis: Stage41-A numbers checked directly against the recovered Stage39-C (dev/Stage34/Stage35) and Stage40-A on-disk source JSON reports. This resolves the source_verified=false gap from Stage42-A.

dev_residual_support_to_refute_note.note: Confirmed against reports/stage39c_safe_structured_v2_dev_report.json safety_counters.support_to_refute = 46. This is a residual (pre-existing) error, not a Stage39-introduced error; introduced_support_to_REFUTE for dev is 0.

claim_consistency.result: no forbidden claims found; all allowed claims present, now source-verified rather than reference-only

shadow_diagnostic_owner_vs_final_compose.evidence: Executive summary and main result table separate Stage33/36/37/38 (shadow, diagnostic only) from Stage39/40 (final composer)

explicit_opt_in_vs_default_off.evidence: Allowed claims and final interpretation both state composer remains disabled by default; confirmed by Stage40-A default_off_policy_check.policy_confirmed=true in the recovered source report

residual_vs_introduced_errors.evidence: Limitations and composer-table note separate residual model errors (dev support_to_refute=46, Stage35 support_to_refute=7) from composer-introduced errors (0 in all cases); both figures now confirmed against recovered source reports' safety_counters/residual_errors sections

synthetic_probe_vs_naturalistic_validati.evidence: Limitations state Stage34/35 are synthetic/probe-style; final recommendation calls for external/naturalistic validation; Stage40-A recommendation text independently repeats this requirement

table_consistency.result: table audit passes; all Stage34/Stage35 macro-F1, changed-row, and introduced-error values in stage41a_final_composer_table.md match the recovered Stage39-C and Stage40-A source reports exactly

artifact_index.purpose: Source evaluation of safe_structured_v2 composer on the dev split (no-op safety check)
artifact_index.citable_note: now present and read directly for this audit
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Dev is the model's own held-out evaluation split; must not be reused for further training/calibration of the composer.

artifact_index.purpose: Source evaluation of safe_structured_v2 composer on the Stage34 held-out probe
artifact_index.citable_note: now present and read directly for this audit
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Stage34 is a synthetic/probe diagnostic set; must remain diagnostic-only, not used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

artifact_index.purpose: Source evaluation of safe_structured_v2 composer on the Stage35 adversarial probe
artifact_index.citable_note: now present and read directly for this audit
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Stage35 is a synthetic/probe adversarial set; must remain diagnostic-only, not used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

artifact_index.purpose: Integrated regression audit aggregating dev/Stage34/Stage35 Stage39-C reports; confirms zero introduced unsafe transitions and default-off policy
artifact_index.evidence_type: source evidence (aggregation of the three Stage39-C reports)
artifact_index.citable_note: now present and read directly for this audit
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Audit-only, not a training signal; reads existing reports without running training/evaluation/Kaggle.

artifact_index.purpose: Consolidated, paper-ready narrative and tables summarizing Stage33-40 results
artifact_index.citable_note: citable; numbers now independently source-verified against the recovered Stage39-C/Stage40-A reports (this audit)
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Reporting-only; must not be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

artifact_index.purpose: Standalone comparison table of support_only / safe_structured / safe_structured_v2 / Stage40 audit
artifact_index.citable_note: citable; row values source-verified in this audit

artifact_index.purpose: Prior audit attempt that flagged the Stage39-C/Stage40-A source reports as missing and returned an INCOMPLETE decision; documents the completeness gap this Stage42-B audit resolves
artifact_index.evidence_type: derived summary (audit of derived summaries; superseded on the completeness question by Stage42-B)
artifact_index.citable_note: citable as historical record of the provenance gap; superseded for verification purposes by Stage42-B
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Reporting/audit-only; Stage41/42 documents are derived summaries, not new experimental evidence.

artifact_index.purpose: Re-runs the Stage42-A checklist now that Stage39-C and Stage40-A source reports are committed; independently verifies Stage41-A numbers, claims, boundaries, and table against on-disk source reports
artifact_index.evidence_type: derived summary (audit of derived summaries, cross-checked against source evidence)
artifact_index.citable_note: citable as the current authoritative consistency audit for Stage41-A claims
artifact_index.leakage_warning: Reporting/audit-only; must not be used for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design.

warnings: Stage41-A's dev residual support_to_refute = 46 figure is not part of the task-supplied 'required source values' checklist, but is independently confirmed against reports/stage39c_safe_structured_v2_dev_report.json safety_counters.support_to_refute = 46, matching Stage41-A's limitations-section figure exactly.
recommendation: Stage42-A's incomplete provenance gap has been resolved by committing the Stage39-C and Stage40-A source reports. Stage41-A's frozen result claims are now traceable to committed source artifacts. Proceed to external/naturalistic validation before making broader model-level claims.

leakage_policy.description: This is reporting/audit only. Do not use Stage34/35 probes or derived reports for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design. Stage41/42 documents are derived summaries, not new experimental evidence.
